session.user:
Run the following command from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results:
make lint ty
Report any failures or confirm all passing.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type-checking commands for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint and type checking

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:13: lint] Error 1
uv run ruff check I001 [*] Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted --> tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py:3:1 | 1 | """Tests for land_learn module: learn plan creation logic.""" 2 | 3 | / import json 4 | | from datetime import UTC, datetime 5 | | from pathlib import Path 6 | | 7 | | import pytest 8 | | 9 | | from dataclasses import replace 10 | | 11 | | from erk.cli.commands.land_learn import ( 12 | | _compute_session_stats, 13 | | _create_learn_pr_impl, 14 | | _create_learn_pr_with_sessions, 15 | | _log_learn_pr_files, 16 | | _log_session_discovery, 17 | | _should_create_learn_pr, 18 | | ) 19 | | from erk.cli.commands.land_pipeline import LandState, create_learn_pr 20 | | from erk.core.context import context_for_test 21 | | from erk_shared.context.types import GlobalConfig, LoadedConfig 22 | | from erk_shared.gateway.claude_installation.fake import ( 23 | | FakeClaudeInstallation,
... [16 lines omitted] ...
Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
**Linting failed: 1 error found**
| File | Location | Rule | Message | |------|----------|------|---------| | tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py | Line 3:1 | I001 | Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted |
The error is in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py`. The imports are not properly organized. The issue is that there's an extra blank line before the `from dataclasses import replace` statement (line 9), which breaks the import block organization. Imports should be grouped logically without blank lines separating them in the middle of a block.
The command indicates this is fixable with `--fix`, but since devrun is read-only, I'm reporting the failure. The parent agent will need to fix the import order in that file.
